packageRules.description: Group non-major Go updates across the root and examples modules into a single PR
Regenerate core-deps.golden only on branches that change Go modules; write atomically and never commit an empty file

commands: GOWORK=off go list -m all | awk '{print $1}' | LC_ALL=C sort > core-deps.golden.tmp && test -s core-deps.golden.tmp && mv core-deps.golden.tmp core-deps.golden
